plan_adherence_notes: Execution matched the three planned steps: `service_index_payload()` now advertises `/v1/accounts/{id}/exposure`, `route_request(...)` accepts `GET /v1/accounts/{id}/exposure` with the same GET-only 405 guard pattern as `/risk`, and `resolve_market_command(...)` now invokes resolved-market exposure cleanup via a new `settle_market_account_exposure(...)` helper. The implementation also added focused unit/integration regressions, which is consistent with the plan's implied verification scope. The only notable scope choice was to keep `exposureCleanup` as an internal resolution seam rather than widening the public resolve payload, which the plan explicitly allowed.
